title: Artecho Watercolour Paint Set, 18 Colors, Watertbrush Pen Included, Lightweight and Portable,Watercolour Paints for Artists and Beginners
features: 18 vibrant colors watercolor cake comes in with 1 good quality paint brush.Our colors are strongly pigmented, rich, and clear. Easy to create an endless range of colors.

The watercolor paint set comes with a lightweight and detachable metal box. In addition, the metal ring under the case makes it easy to hold the paint set when you are creating. It is very portable so that we can paint anywhere: park, beach, train, home, art class or in the studio.
Suitable for art students and artists. An ideal gift for a birthday, Christmas, Thanksgiving, graduation, or any other special event.
We believe that our products do not have any quality problems. If there is any problem for any reason, please contact us in time. We will definitely give you a satisfactory answer.
